# GitHub Profile README Setup

To display a profile README on your GitHub profile page, you need to create a special repository.

## Steps to Enable Profile README

1. **Create a new repository** with the exact name: `dmeltonyan` (must match your GitHub username)

2. **Make it public** and initialize with a README

3. **Copy the content** from `.github/profile/README.md` to the root `README.md` of that repository

4. **Commit and push** - GitHub will automatically display it on your profile page

## Alternative: Use This Repository

If you prefer, you can also:
- Rename this repository to match your username
- Move the profile README to the root
- Make it public

The profile README will appear at: `https://github.com/dmeltonyan`
